entity.summary: Permissionless automated-market-maker exchange embedded in The Arena social ecosystem on Avalanche, supporting token creation, liquidity deployment, and trading for Arena-generated and whitelisted assets.
entity.notes: HEI uses 2025-05-01 as a month-level launch marker because contemporary reporting describes a May 2025 launch without preserving an exact day. The exchange is modeled separately from the broader Arena social network and token-launch service, while remaining part of that ecosystem. Current official terms explicitly describe permissionless DEX access, and live third-party protocol metrics support active status.

events.title: Arena DEX launched on Avalanche
events.description: The Arena ecosystem opened its permissionless decentralized exchange and liquidity mechanism for ecosystem tokens on Avalanche.
events.notes: The exact launch day was not recovered. The date is normalized to the beginning of the May 2025 launch month documented by contemporary reporting and supported by Q2 2025 protocol activity.

evidence.title: Arena DEX tops $150M volume after May launch
evidence.notes: Contemporary coverage identifies the Arena DEX as an Avalanche venue launched in May 2025 and reports early cumulative trading volume.

evidence.title: Arena DEX protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Protocol metrics show Avalanche DEX activity and revenue beginning in Q2 2025, corroborating the documented May launch window.

evidence.title: The Arena Terms of Use
evidence.notes: First-party terms explicitly describe a permissionless decentralized exchange that facilitates token liquidity, trading, and market deployment through The Arena services.

evidence.title: Introducing The Arena
evidence.notes: Current first-party site identifies the parent social and creator ecosystem in which the DEX operates.

evidence.title: Arena DEX TVL, fees, revenue and volume
evidence.notes: Current Avalanche TVL, fee, revenue, and DEX-volume metrics independently support active operation.
